prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style dragon attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact draconic burst with a cobalt-violet core, ember-gold rim light, angular scale shards, and tight impact fragments. Make the subject a compact hit bloom at the moment of contact, with a dense cobalt-violet center, ember-gold edge pulse, and sharp scale fragments radiating outward. Keep it readable at small size and battle-ready. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
negative_prompt: no background, no arena, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no text, no watermark, no UI, no frame, no checkerboard, no fake transparency pattern, no giant beam, no long travel trail, no fog wall, no elemental fireball
notes: Primary shared hit bloom with the strongest dragon read.
